hero.name: Alejandro Vásquez
hero.tagline: I design and build meaningful experiences.
hero.description: I'm passionate about technology and a constantly evolving digital creator, driven by my interest in continuous learning and a strong desire to leave a lasting impact through each of my projects.

about.title: About me
about.description: I am a digital professional with skills in UX/UI design and full stack development, specializing in creating intuitive and functional user experiences. My experience spans both frontend and backend, allowing me to deliver complete and efficient solutions. Additionally, as an IT Manager passionate about technology, I have solid experience in managing technological and operational infrastructures, always seeking to optimize processes and leverage innovation to digitally transform organizations.

softSkills.title: Soft skills that pay the bills
softSkills.description: In addition to my experience in design and technology, I also have strong leadership skills, time management and multitasking, developed through my experience as IT leader in a private school. Outside of work, I like to stay active by playing sports like soccer. I'm confident in my ability to bring passion and value to any project.

methods.title: Research and planning
methods.description: One of the aspects I like most about creating is planning the architecture of a project. From design systems to brand strategy, I enjoy working with the many touchpoints of the user experience.

technical.title: Technical Skills
technical.description: Experience in full-stack development and technology infrastructure management, with focus on modern web solutions and process automation.

items.descriptionTitle: Collaborative educational platform with AI for curriculum management.
items.description: Essential tool developed with the educational technology innovation team at Liceo Taller San Miguel, helping teachers in class planning and integrating metrics and statistics for pilot tests in multiple schools.
keyFeatures: Integrated AI agent for academic content generation and lesson planning.
Advanced metrics and statistics for institutional pilot testing.
Real‑time updates to study plans and resource library.

items.descriptionTitle: Comprehensive redesign of public services platform with advanced analytics.
items.description: Complete redesign of public services website with Google Analytics integration for data collection, automated PHP scripts for newspaper publication updates, and optimization of payment gateway functions and invoice verification.
keyFeatures: Complete integration with Google Analytics for data analysis.
Automated PHP scripts for newspaper content updates.
Advanced optimization of payment gateway and invoice verification.
Enhanced mobile responsiveness and improved loading times.
items.techStack: WordPress, PHP, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Google Analytics

items.descriptionTitle: Premium medical website specialized in aesthetic surgery under development.
items.description: Specialized website for aesthetic surgery currently under implementation, developed with complete Figma prototype and modern web technologies to deliver a premium user experience.
keyFeatures: Complete interactive prototype developed in Figma.
Premium design specialized for medical-aesthetic sector.
Implementation in progress with custom WordPress.
Optimization for premium user experience.
items.techStack: Figma, WordPress, HTML, CSS - In Development

items.descriptionTitle: Suite of educational tools in production for institutional management.
items.description: Collection of web applications developed specifically for Liceo Taller San Miguel, including AI-powered insights system, student tracking platform, and automation with n8n in Docker containers.
keyFeatures: Insights System: Teacher evaluation with AI feedback and dynamic charts.
Angel Platform: Real-time student behavioral tracking.
Deployment with n8n on own server with Docker containers.
Complete integration with PostgreSQL and Supabase databases.
items.techStack: Next.js, Supabase, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Docker, n8n
